message:
refactor(contracts): derive mapping count from SURFACE_CONTRACT_V1 instead of hardcoding

Replace hardcoded count assertion (was 18) with dynamic comparison
against SURFACE_CONTRACT_V1.len(). Add BTreeSet-based drift detection
reporting missing and extra APIs between compatibility mappings and the
contract table. Update doc comment to say "every entry" instead of a
specific number. Update proptest and integration tests accordingly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
